creator: kazarov@izmiran.rssi.ru
text:
This is a SMP system with 2 Celeron-466. 
ZyXEL Omni 56K Plus modem plugged into the USB port.
System correctly detects modem but on after disconnection and reconnection disables port.

ugen0: at uhub0 port 1 (addr 2) disconnected
ugen0: detached
uhub0: device problem, disabling port 1
uhub0: device problem, disabling port 1

I've tried also to connect HP scanner and Creative USB camera with similar behaviour: system correctly recognize device on startup but disables port on reconnection. All devices work correctly on MS Windows ME.
